display_information.name: Databuddy
display_information.description: Ask Databuddy for analytics answers in Slack.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Ask Databuddy about traffic, conversions, campaigns, pages, referrers, and product usage.

suggested_prompts.title: Weekly changes
suggested_prompts.message: What changed in traffic, conversions, and top pages over the last 7 days?

suggested_prompts.title: Find anomalies
suggested_prompts.message: What looks unusual in our analytics today?

suggested_prompts.title: Channel performance
suggested_prompts.message: Which referrers and campaigns are driving the best traffic this week?

slash_commands.description: Approve this channel for Databuddy answers.
slash_commands.usage_hint: Use when automatic channel approval is unavailable.

slash_commands.description: Show how to use Databuddy in Slack.
Check whether Databuddy is connected and ready here.
